is this thing on?

home

realising that there’s a lot to learn, took my time to get to it.

  1. you can just do things, action produces information
  2. plenty needles in plenty haystacks, magnets everywhere
  3. cornucopia awaits

here’s the game plan:

  • work on cs fundamentals
        a. found a good roadmap
        b. make small projects to understand concepts deeply
  • work on side projects, try to find intersections of fun and usability
  • log philosophies, ideas, and thoughts that seem important
